name: No witnesses to forklift pinning me at warehouse, what now?
description: Medical, forklift inspection, logs suffice; lawyer reconstructs.

mainEntity.name: No witnesses to forklift pinning me at warehouse, what now?

acceptedAnswer.text: Medical, forklift inspection, logs suffice; lawyer reconstructs.
acceptedAnswer.description: Use medical records, forklift damage, coworker logs, video; circumstantial evidence works.[5] Context: Solo incidents common. Key factors: Timestamped logs, expert reconstruction. Practical guidance: Attorney subpoenas records; builds case without eyes. Viable claims.
